description: This file defines an Angular component named DashboardComponent that displays a dashboard with a bar chart, responsive layout, and interactive features such as randomizing data and adapting to screen size.

classes.name: DashboardComponent
classes.description: An Angular component that renders a responsive dashboard with a bar chart, including methods for interaction and layout adaptation.

methods.name: chartClicked
methods.description: Event handler for when the chart is clicked; currently does nothing.

methods.name: chartHovered
methods.description: Event handler for when the chart is hovered over; currently does nothing.

methods.name: randomize
methods.description: Randomizes some data points in the bar chart and updates the chart display.
